channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Trae Young's 49-foot buzzer-beater lifts Hawks to a 124-121 win over the Jazz
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (AP) — Trae Young hit a buzzer-beating 3-pointer from beyond the halfcourt line to give the Atlanta Hawks a 124-121 victory over the Utah Jazz on Tuesday night.
item.dc:creator: JOHN COON, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Ready for takeoff: Duke star Cooper Flagg puts highlight-dunk signature on Pittsburgh win
item.description: DURHAM, N.C. (AP) — Cooper Flagg was still simmering, angry at himself, for picking up his third foul so early in the second half before knocking away an entry pass to force a turnover.
item.dc:creator: AARON BEARD, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Lakers coach JJ Redick says his family evacuated and people are 'freaking out' due to LA wildfires
item.description: DALLAS (AP) — Los Angeles Lakers coach JJ Redick said members of his family were among those in Southern California forced to evacuate their homes on Tuesday due to a wildfire that was being whipped by strong winds around Los Angeles.
item.dc:creator: STEFAN STEVENSON, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Utes drop fourth straight to #3 Iowa State, 82-59
item.description: AMES, Iowa (ABC4 Sports) - The Utes gave #3 Iowa State a game, but the Cyclones overpowered the Utes down the stretch for an 82-59 victory, handing the Utes their fourth straight defeat. Curtis Jones had 23 points off the bench to lead Iowa State to its 10th straight win.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Padres' late owner's widow sues for control of team from his siblings
item.description: The widow of deceased team owner Peter Seidler has filed a lawsuit against his two brothers in attempt to take control of the team.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Nuggets center Nikola Jokic sidelined for game against Celtics due to illness
item.description: Three-time NBA MVP Nikola Jokic was sidelined for Denver’s clash with Jayson Tatum and the Boston Celtics on Tuesday night because of an illness.
item.dc:creator: Pat Graham, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Penn State, Notre Dame arrive at Orange Bowl with a bigger game in mind
item.description: DANIA BEACH, Fla. (AP) — In an era that is now long gone, a trip to the Orange Bowl meant a break from the rough weather up north and the capper to a successful season that, if things had gone great, ended with a championship trophy in the case.
item.dc:creator: EDDIE PELLS, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Raiders fire coach Antonio Pierce after he goes 4-13 in lone full season
item.description: HENDERSON, Nev. (AP) — Antonio Pierce stood behind a lectern and took questions during an end-of-season news conference, even though his future as the Las Vegas Raiders' coach remained very much in question.
item.dc:creator: MARK ANDERSON, Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: Dolphins’ Tyreek Hill ‘never’ requested a trade in meeting with team brass, GM says
item.description: Miami Dolphins general manager Chris Grier and head coach Mike McDaniel met with star receiver Tyreek Hill on Monday after he indicated following Sunday's loss that he is ready to move on.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Titans, with No. 1 draft pick, fire general manager Ran Carthon
item.description: The Tennessee Titans fired general manager Ran Carthon after the team was 9-25 over his two seasons. The Titans hold the No. 1 overall pick in the 2025 NFL Draft.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Vikings lineman's wife says she was 'heckled, touched and called names' during game vs Lions
item.description: The wife of Minnesota Vikings offensive lineman Dalton Risner revealed in a video on Sunday she was incessantly heckled by Detroit Lions fans last year.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: The 49ers fire special teams coordinator Brian Schneider, AP source says
item.description: SANTA CLARA, Calif. (AP) — The San Francisco 49ers fired special teams coach Brian Schneider following a season when repeated blunders in the kicking contributed to a losing season, a person familiar with the decision told The Associated Press on Monday night.
item.dc:creator: JOSH DUBOW, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Scottie Scheffler withdraws from another tournament, hopes to play at Pebble Beach
item.description: DALLAS (AP) — Scottie Scheffler withdrew from The American Express on Monday, saying his right hand has not fully recovered from minor surgery to repair a glass puncture over Christmas. Scheffler, the world's No.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Suns' Beal stars as a reserve in win over 76ers and makes it clear he believes he is an NBA starter
item.description: PHILADELPHIA (AP) — Bradley Beal made the most of the unfamiliar role of substitute for the Phoenix Suns. That doesn't mean he had to like it.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Zac Blair tries to regain PGA Tour status
item.description: PROVO, Utah (ABC4 Sports) - The first full field event of the season on the PGA Tour, the Hawaiian Open, tees off on Thursday. Former BYU star Zac Blair flew out to Hawaii to try to Monday qualify because he no longer has full status on the tour.
item.dc:creator: Wesley Ruff, ABC 4

item.title: Zuckerberg taps UFC President Dana White for Meta's board of directors
item.description: (KRON) -- Meta founder and CEO Mark Zuckerberg rings in the new year with several major personnel announcements. Three high-profile individuals have been named to join Meta's board of directors, including one of the most prominent figures in sports.
item.dc:creator: Aaron Tolentino, KRON4

item.title: Final field for 2025 Farmers Insurance Open in San Diego shaping up
item.description: The 2025 Farmers Insurance Open is set to take place in San Diego from January 22-25, 2025, featuring a field of major championship winners, past winners, and players with San Diego ties. Tickets went on sale in October.
item.dc:creator: Anna Ashcraft, Fox 5

item.title: Tampa Bay Buccaneers secure playoff win: Fans celebrate victory
item.description: TAMPA, Fla. (WFLA) — With the Bucs clinching a playoff spot, fans are fired up as they look ahead to the next steps in their postseason journey. It was a rough start for fans cheering on the Tampa Bay Buccaneers against the New Orleans Saints on the opening drives.
item.dc:creator: WFLA, NBC

item.title: Sensabaugh stays hot as Jazz beat Orlando, 105-92
item.description: ORLANDO (ABC4 Sports) - So far, 2025 has treated the Utah Jazz pretty well, especially Brice Sensabaugh.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Colts owner Jim Irsay says he's retaining GM Chris Ballard and coach Shane Steichen
item.description: About four hours after the Colts completed their season with a 26-23 overtime victory over the Jacksonville Jaguars, Irsay ended any speculation about possible offseason changes by announcing in a letter to fans that longtime general manager Chris Ballard and second-year coach Shane Steichen would r
item.dc:creator: MICHAEL MAROT, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Bears vs. Packers: Injuries, inactives, matchups and what to know for the 2024 season finale
item.description: UPDATE: The Bears and Packers have announced their inactives for Sunday's game. See below. GREEN BAY, Wis. — A long, trying 2024 season for the Bears reaches its merciful conclusion Sunday afternoon at Lambeau Field.
item.dc:creator: Michael Johnson, WGN 9

item.title: Utah HC falls in overtime to Dallas, 3-2
item.description: DALLAS (AP) - Thomas Harley scored 3:01 into overtime to give the Dallas Stars their fourth straight win, 3-2 against the Utah Hockey Club at American Airlines Center on Saturday. Matt Duchene found Harley near the right post after collecting his own rebound in front of the net.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Chicago Bulls plan to retire Derrick Rose's jersey next season
item.description: CHICAGO (AP) — Derrick Rose wasn't sure how he will feel when sees his No. 1 hanging from the rafters. He was still trying to process the news. The Chicago Bulls announced Saturday they plan to retire Rose's jersey sometime next season.
item.dc:creator: ANDREW SELIGMAN, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Chiefs finally depart KC for Denver amid ice storm after 4 hours spent waiting on the tarmac
item.description: KANSAS CITY, Mo. (AP) — The Chiefs finally departed from Kansas City International Airport for their game in Denver on Saturday after spending about four hours stranded on the tarmac amid an ice storm that blanketed the region ahead of an impending blizzard.
item.dc:creator: DAVE SKRETTA, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: BBB provides tips on buying Detroit Lions tickets, avoiding scams
item.description: The Better Business Bureau of West Michigan is providing some tips if you’re looking to buy tickets to the Detroit Lions game on Sunday.
item.dc:creator: Meghan Bunchman, NewsNation

item.title: Naval Base San Diego basketball introduces two teams
item.description: The Naval Base San Diego basketball team is led by LaQuan Hansley, the former Triton player-turned-head coach, who revived the program after it was shut down during the COVID-19 pandemic.
item.dc:creator: Frank Jefferson, Fox 5

item.title: Olympic sprinter arrested in Florida on alleged police battery incident: report
item.description: United States sprinter Fred Kerley was arrested in Miami Beach for alleged battery of a law enforcement official, NBC affiliate WTVJ reports.
item.dc:creator: Garrett Phillips, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Utah HC storms back at Calgary to end five-game skid
item.description: CALGARY (ABC4 Sports) - Lawson Crouse scored twice, and the Utah Hockey Club rallied for a 5-3 win against the Calgary Flames at Scotiabank Saddledome on Thursday to end a five-game losing skid.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4
